mapper.sql: t.id, t.name, t.type, t.endpoint, t.recipients, t.secret, t.headers_json, t.enabled, t.remark, t.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM xxl_job_alarm_channel AS t ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT FROM xxl_job_alarm_channel AS t WHERE t.enabled = 1 ORDER BY t.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xxl_job_alarm_channel ( name, type, endpoint, recipients, secret, headers_json, enabled, remark, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{type}, #{endpoint}, #{recipients}, #{secret}, #{headersJson}, #{enabled}, #{remark}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE xxl_job_alarm_channel SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, endpoint = #{endpoint}, recipients = #{recipients}, secret = #{secret}, headers_json = #{headersJson}, enabled = #{enabled}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
